chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-5970 of 2024 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For order on office objection. 2.For hearing of Misc.No.26526/2024 3.For hearing of main case. 20.01.2025 Mr.Omer Ilyas Khan, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Fahim Raza, for Respondent (F.B.R) Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. This Petition was filed by impugning the recovery proceedings initiated by the respondent Department, during the pendency of the appeal before the Commissioner (Appeals-I), Zone-IV, Unit 05, Large Taxpayer Office, PRC Tower, 32-A, Lalazar, M.T. Khan Road, Karachi (Respondent No.4). The respective learned counsel jointly state that it may be just and proper to dispose of this petition with directions for expeditious conclusion of the appeal, while restraining the recovery of the impugned demand in the interim period. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of by directing the Commissioner (Appeals-I), Zone-IV, Unit 05, Large Taxpayer Office, PRC Tower, 32-A, Lalazar, M.T. Khan Road, Karachi (Respondent No.4) to decide the pending Appeal expeditiously; preferably within 60 days from the date hereof. However, the respondents shall not take any coercive action against the petitioner, in respect of the impugned demand, till the conclusion of the Appeal. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms along with listed application(s). Judge Judge nasir`
